text:

    multimedia/gstreamer1-*: Retire libkate

    Rationale:
    libkate is going away in
    https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=268179 after being
    unmaintained upstream for a long time.

    PR:             268183
    Reviewed by:    riggs
